expectations.text: CK1 document is classified under CIPC bucket
expectations.evidence: owner_classification.json lines 56-84: cipc.documents contains a CK1 entry with filename 'ck1.txt' and status 'found'

expectations.text: Both member ID documents (Willem and Greta) are classified under FICA bucket
expectations.evidence: owner_classification.json lines 9-34: fica.documents contains SA ID for Willem Adriaan Botha (willem_id.txt) and SA ID for Greta Susanna Botha (greta_id.txt), both with status 'found'

expectations.text: CK1 extracts both members with interest percentages (60% and 40%)
expectations.evidence: owner_classification.json lines 66-79: cipc.documents[0].extracted.members contains Willem Adriaan Botha with interest_percentage '60' and Greta Susanna Botha with interest_percentage '40'

expectations.text: CC name 'PAARL BUILDING SUPPLIES CC' is correctly extracted
expectations.evidence: owner_classification.json line 63: cc_name is 'Paarl Building Supplies CC'. The name matches (case difference only — output uses title case rather than all-caps, but the name is correctly identified)

expectations.text: CK number CK1998/034521/23 is correctly extracted
Missing: SARS Tax Number is listed in fica.missing
expectations.evidence: owner_classification.json line 51: fica.missing contains "SARS Income Tax Number for the CC"

expectations.text: Missing: Bank Confirmation Letter is listed in fica.missing
expectations.evidence: owner_classification.json line 50: fica.missing contains "Bank Confirmation Letter"

expectations.text: FICA status is 'incomplete' due to missing tax number and bank letter
expectations.evidence: owner_classification.json line 7: "status": "incomplete". The fica.missing array lists both 'Bank Confirmation Letter' and 'SARS Income Tax Number for the CC'

expectations.text: CIPC status is 'complete' — CK1 is present
expectations.evidence: owner_classification.json line 56: cipc.status is 'needs_review', not 'complete'. The CK1 document was found, but the system flagged the status as 'needs_review' due to potential CK2 amendments and unverified CIPC active status. The assertion expects 'complete'.
